sentences.arabic: الْمَشْيُ رِيَاضَةٌ سَهْلَةٌ جِدًّا وَمُفِيدَةٌ لِلْقَلْبِ.
sentences.translation: Hodanje je vrlo lagana i korisna vježba za srce.
sentences.translationEn: Walking is a very easy and useful exercise for the heart.

sentences.arabic: أَمْشِي لِمُدَّةِ ثَلَاثِينَ دَقِيقَةً فِي الْحَدِيقَةِ كُلَّ صَبَاحٍ.
sentences.translation: Šetam trideset minuta u parku svako jutro.
sentences.translationEn: I walk for thirty minutes in the park every morning.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الْعَادَةُ تُحَسِّنُ الْمِزَاجَ وَتُقَلِّلُ التَّوَتُّرَ.
sentences.translation: Ova navika popravlja raspoloženje i smanjuje stres.
sentences.translationEn: This habit improves the mood and reduces stress.
